sevenDayForecast.headline: A Low chance of redevelopment of Ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji next weekend off the northwest WA coast.
points: Refer to any Severe Weather Warnings, and Flood Watches and Warnings for more information regarding Ex-Tropical Cyclone Koji over Queensland.
During the coming week Koji is forecast to continue to move west and then northwest, through the Gulf Country and towards the Northern Territory, then potentially towards northern WA next weekend.
Next weekend if Koji does move off the northern WA coast, it has a chance of redeveloping into a tropical cyclone.
